## Architecture Checklist

If this PR adds a service, module, or external dependency:

- [ ] Updated relevant diagram in `docs/architecture/`
- [ ] Written or updated ADR in `docs/adr/` (if significant decision)
- [ ] Updated `AGENTS.md` documentation references (if new doc file)
- [ ] Cross-references in existing docs still resolve

If none of the above apply, delete this section.
